name: Peace Maker
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the bread lengthwise and scoop out the soft interior to form a shell.
2. In a skillet, fry the bacon until crisp. Remove and drain on paper towels.
3. Sprinkle the oysters with flour and fry in the bacon fat until browned on both sides. Remove and keep warm.
4. Slice the tomatoes and cook in the remaining bacon fat until heated through, about 15-20 minutes.
5. Place the cooked bacon, oysters, and tomatoes inside the bread shell.
6. Cut the bread diagonally into slices.
7. Mix the sour cream and horseradish together to create a sauce.
8. Serve as desired. Makes 4 servings.
